title: Elevate 2021 Form Error
excerpt:
I am trying to sign up for Elevate and the form is giving me an error and to try again later. I have been trying for 2 days… 
Help, myself and 1 other team member want to sign up.

posts.author: Amanda115 (Amanda)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am trying to sign up for Elevate and the form is giving me an error and to try again later. I have been trying for 2 days…

Help, myself and 1 other team member want to sign up.

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Amanda115

Sorry to hear you were having issues with signing up for Elevate!
Were you able to sign up successfully? If not, please feel free to pop us over your email address in a private message so that we can make sure you receive access to the recordings once they’re available

I apologise for the inconvenience here!

Best,

Dani

posts.author: Dani (Dani Lester)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Amanda115

As we haven’t had a reply to this thread in over a week, I’m going to go ahead and close this for now.
Please do feel free to reach out to us if you’re still having issues, and we’d be happy to continue to assist and make sure you have access to all of the Elevate sessions!

Best,

Dani
